message.content:
Fetch the following GitHub pages and return the complete raw file contents of all .nix files:

1. Hardware config repo: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lcleveland/eiros.hardware.framework/main/flake.nix
   Also try: https://github.com/lcleveland/eiros.hardware.framework

2. Users config repo: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lcleveland/eiros.users.personal/main/flake.nix
   Also try: https://github.com/lcleveland/eiros.users.personal

Return the full raw text of every file you can access from these repos.

content.text: I'll fetch the flake.nix files from both repositories using the raw GitHub URLs.
Now let me check if there are other .nix files available in these repositories by accessing them via the regular GitHub URLs:

input.prompt: List all .nix files in this repository
List all .nix files in this repository

content.content:
# Nix Files in lcleveland/eiros.hardware.framework

Based on the repository structure shown, there are **2 Nix files** in the root directory:

1. **flake.nix** - Located at the repository root
2. **hardware-configuration.nix** - Located at the repository root

Additionally, there is a `resources/nix` directory that likely contains additional Nix files, though their specific names are not detailed in the provided content.

The repository is written entirely in Nix (100.0% according to the language statistics), suggesting it's a NixOS hardware configuration framework.

# Nix Files in lcleveland/eiros.users.personal

Based on the repository structure shown, there is **1 .nix file** at the root level:

- **flake.nix** — Located at the repository root

The repository also contains a directory `resources/nix`, which likely houses additional Nix-related files, though their specific names aren't listed in the provided page content.

The repository itself is primarily composed of Nix language files (100.0% according to the language breakdown), suggesting it's a Nix configuration or package management project.

content.text: Let me fetch the hardware-configuration.nix and the import_modules.nix files that are referenced:

content.content:
dir:
let
  inherit (builtins)
    readDir
    attrNames
    filter
    match
    concatLists
    ;
  collectImports =
    relPath:
    let
      fullPath = if relPath == "" then dir else dir + "/${relPath}";
      entries = readDir fullPath;
      processEntry =
        name:
        let
          subRelPath = if relPath == "" then name else "${relPath}/${name}";
          entryPath = dir + "/${subRelPath}";
          entryType = entries.${name};
        in
        if entryType == "directory" then
          collectImports subRelPath
        else if entryType == "regular" && match ".*\\.nix" name != null then
          [ (import entryPath) ]
        else
          [ ];
    in
    concatLists (map processEntry (attrNames entries));
in
collectImports ""

dir:
let
  inherit (builtins)
    readDir
    attrNames
    match
    concatLists
    ;
  collectImports =
    relPath:
    let
      fullPath = if relPath == "" then dir else dir + "/${relPath}";
      entries = readDir fullPath;
      processEntry =
        name:
        let
          subRelPath = if relPath == "" then name else "${relPath}/${name}";
          entryPath = dir + "/${subRelPath}";
          entryType = entries.${name};
        in
        if entryType == "directory" then
          collectImports subRelPath
        else if entryType == "regular" && match ".*\\.nix" name != null then
          [ (import entryPath) ]
        else
          [ ];
    in
    concatLists (map processEntry (attrNames entries));
in
collectImports ""
